Mother's Day202622 Shots · 5 Scenes

Shot List — Internal Reference

Har Maa ki aankhon
mein hum hero hain

A film in feet. Two pairs of shoes. One story of the only person who ever really looked at you.

22Total Shots
5Scenes
~90"Est. Duration
LowCamera Angle
Scene 01Café Exterior — The Rejection
Cold · Urban
01
Wide · EstablishCold

Low angle, 8 inches off ground. Café exterior pavement. Multiple feet passing — a city in motion. His shoes stand still among the moving crowd. Only his feet are still.

"Kisi ne sahi kaha hai…"
CameraLow angle, ground level
MotionCrowd in motion, subject static
ColorDesaturated · Blue-grey
Duration~5 sec
Café ambience, chatter
02
Medium · Her EntryCold

Her heels enter frame from screen-left. Stop directly across from his shoes. A pause. His hand reaches forward — extending the chair. Her hand picks up her bag from the chair before he can pull it out for her.

"Aap bhale hi kisi ke liye 5/10 hoge…"
CameraLow, eye-level to shoes
MotionHeels enter, stop, pivot
ColorCold, grey pavement
Duration~7 sec
Heel clicks
03
Close · DepartureCold

Her heels pivot. Walk away. He does not move. The empty chair beside him is held in frame. His hand rests on the back of it for a moment. Then releases.

"…toh apni mummy ke liye…"
CameraLow angle, static
MotionHeels exit, hand releases
ColorCold, muted
Duration~4 sec
Soft thud, ambient street
04
Close · HandsCold

He bends. His hands pick up nothing — instead, he straightens his own trouser crease. A self-correcting gesture. Dusts his knees. Stands.

"…toh sab Shah Rukh Khan hote hain…"
CameraClose, floor level
MotionBend, dust, stand
ColorCold tones
Duration~3 sec
Fabric rustle
Scene 02Home — The Validation
Warm · Memory
05
Match Cut · TransitionMemory

Seamless match cut — same bending posture, but now on mosaic home floor. Warm tile beneath. The colour temperature shifts from cold to amber in a single frame. His hands now tying shoelaces — not adjusting himself, being adjusted.

"Sir par tel lagakar…"
CameraMatch cut from Shot 04
MotionContinuous bend, transition
ColorCold to warm in one cut
Duration~3 sec
Soft whoosh, piano begins
06
Close · HandsWarm

Mom's hands — oiled, bangles on wrist — working through his hair visible at the top of frame. His shoulders visibly relax. Shot stays waist-up cutoff, hair suggested not seen. Her feet in chappals beside his.

"…ek questionable color combination mein bhi…"
CameraClose, waist-up
PropGold bangles, oil
ColorWarm amber
Duration~5 sec
Oil sound, bangles clink
07
Medium · Full StandingWarm

He stands. Clothes slightly mismatched — intentional. He looks down at himself, shifts weight to one foot, then slightly turns toward her. The question lives in his posture before he speaks it.

"Theek lag raha hoon na mummy?"
CameraLow angle, full standing
WardrobeSlightly mismatched — intentional
ColorWarm, golden
Duration~4 sec
Light playful tone
08
Close · HandsWarm

Mom's hands fix his collar (visible at top of frame). Brush his shoulders — once, twice. Her thumb lingers on the fabric one beat longer than needed. That linger is the entire film.

"Mummy nazar utar leti thi…"
CameraClose — collar/shoulder
Key DetailThumb lingers one beat longer
ColorWarm
Duration~5 sec
Soft cloth movement
09
Close · FeetWarm

Her feet move in a slow circle around his. The tile floor holds both pairs — her chappals worn and familiar, his shoes new. A ritual made visible only through feet.

"Sochta tha mujhe kaun nazar laga raha hai…"
CameraGround level, feet only
PropWorn chappals vs. new shoes
ColorWarm tile
Duration~5 sec
Soft chime, ambient hum
10
Wide · Memory InsertMemory

Wide low shot of the entire room — both pairs of feet, doorway behind, light streaming in. The warmest frame in the film. Slightly overexposed — as memory always is.

"It was never about me…"
CameraWide, ground level
ExposureSlightly overexposed — memory
ColorMaximum warmth
Duration~4 sec
Piano soft
Scene 03The Transition — Time Passing
Rhythmic · Inserts
11
Insert Series · 3 ShotsMemory

Rapid rhythmic inserts — mom tying his laces (her fingers, his shoes), mom handing him shoes (her hands from below, he takes them standing), mom adjusting his trouser fold (hands at knee level). All on warm mosaic floor.

"Ye maaye hi hai jo…"
CameraExtreme close, all three
EditRapid rhythmic cuts
ColorWarm mosaic tile throughout
Duration~2 sec each
Rhythmic soft cuts
Scene 04New City — The Alone
Cold · Present
12
Wide · StreetCold

Wide low shot — busy street. Many feet. His among them, indistinguishable. He blends in. The city does not know him. The frame is full of motion; he is still.

"Hum sab… bohot mamooli log hai yaar…"
CameraWide, ground level
MotionCrowd moves, he is still
ColorCold, desaturated
Duration~5 sec
City ambience
13
Medium · Memory FlashMemory

Memory: He steps forward — confident stride. Warm floor. Music swells. His feet carry the posture of someone who has been told he is enough.

"Kuch khaas banati hai humein…"
CameraLow angle, home
TriggerMemory flash — warm
ColorWarm, overexposed
Duration~2 sec
Music swell
14
Wide · EstablishCold

Floor of a new apartment — different tile, colder material. Window light cuts across the floor. Edge of a suitcase visible in the corner of frame. His feet enter from the right. Sit down on the edge of something unseen.

"Aaj jab joote khud pehenta hu… ek doosre sheher mein…"
CameraLow, apartment floor
PropSuitcase edge in frame
ColorCold, window light
Duration~6 sec
Distant traffic
15
Extreme Close · HandsCold

His fingers tie the lace. Slowly. One loop, then the other. He pauses mid-tie. His hands stop. A long beat. This is the film's emotional apex — the silence between the question and the absence of answer.

"Laces bandhte bandhte… khud ko khud hi puchta hu…"
CameraExtreme close-up, hands
Key BeatPause mid-lace — hold
ColorCold
Duration~7 sec
Fabric friction, subtle heartbeat
16
Medium · MirrorCold

He stands in front of a mirror — we see only his feet on the cold floor. He adjusts himself: trouser fold, pant hem, shoe edge. He asks the question. The mirror reflects his feet back — double of himself. No answer.

"Theek lag raha hai kya?"
CameraLow, mirror reflection
Key DetailFeet doubled in mirror
ColorCold, grey
Duration~5 sec
Silence
17
Close · Self-CorrectionCold

He fixes his own pant fold. Taps his own shoes. Adjusts his own stance. Each action is a mirror of what his mother used to do — but performed alone, on a cold floor, with no one watching.

"4 galtiya toh khud nikal leta hu…"
CameraClose, floor level
SubtextMimics mother's gestures, alone
ColorCold
Duration~5 sec
Cloth rustle
18
Flash · MemoryMemory

Flash memory: Mom's hand brushing dust from his shoulder. Warm. Overexposed. Gone in a frame.

"Maa ki tarah koi pyaar nahi kar sakta… Aap khud bhi nahi…"
CameraClose, shoulder
Duration~1 sec — flash
ExposureOverexposed, warm
EditFlash cut
Piano peak
Scene 05Café Return + The Threshold — The Ending
Resolution
19
Wide · ReturnCold

Same café. Same spot. People pass him. He stands among the crowd — but the framing is identical to Shot 01. He has not changed to the world. But we have changed how we see him.

"Toh saari duniya bhale hi mumma's boy keh kar mazaak udaye…"
CameraIdentical to Shot 01
BeatWorld unchanged, audience changed
ColorCold, returning
Duration~4 sec
Ambient café
20
Close · DecisionCold

He looks down at his shoes. A beat. Then — he steps forward. Not toward the café, not toward anything in frame. Just forward. The step carries weight.

"Deep down… all that we all want…"
CameraLow, close on shoes
MotionOne deliberate step forward
ColorCold beginning to warm
Duration~5 sec
Music builds
21
Wide · The ThresholdWarm

Outside a door. His shoes stop exactly at the threshold. Beyond the threshold — warm light. And her chappals. He pauses. His weight shifts forward, then steadies. The door opens from the inside. Her feet shuffle toward the threshold from within. Two pairs of feet. Inches apart. The warm light from inside spills over his shoes. Cut to black.

"…is to become our mother's kid again."
CameraLow, door threshold
Key DetailChappals inside, sneakers outside
ColorCold outside, warm inside
Duration~10 sec
Piano resolves, fade out
22
Title CardEnd Card
Dress like she always knew you would.
Snitch

Black. Single line appears: Dress like she always knew you would. Then Snitch logo — small, beneath. No other elements.

—
BackgroundPure black
TextWhite, condensed
Duration~4 sec
LogoBelow tagline, minimal
Fade to silence
